_meta.purpose: Mars surface sites tied to Trust family exposed entries, with access requirements and dismantling hooks.
_meta.note: Each site is a named place the captain can travel to. Discovery and access methods are mechanical prerequisites for the dismantling arc. Tone: dry, operational.

schema.site_id: string — short code for internal refs
schema.name: string — display name
schema.access_requirements: array[string] — methods to enter or unlock
schema.dismantling_hook: string — one sentence on what exposing this site breaks

sites.name: Kessler Vein Alpha
sites.surface_expression: A known mining claim with standard extraction infrastructure at the mouth. Publicly listed as Cartwright-Haulage Zone 7.
sites.secret: The Hales mapped a second unmapped He-3 vein branching off the main lava tube and suppressed the survey data to force a family buyout.
access_requirements: Hale family clearance codes (theft or diplomacy)
Seismic scanner rigged from derelict probe parts
sites.dismantling_hook: Prove a second vein exists. Broker the Hale buyout or publish the data and break Cartwright-Hale's Mars mine monopoly.

sites.name: Caldera Test Site 7
sites.location: Open-air biotech testing ground near Meridiani Planum, Mars
sites.surface_expression: A fenced perimeter with decommissioned livestock pens and standard biohazard signage. T4 lists it as an agricultural research station.
sites.secret: Caldera and Raines ran gestational trait-marker trials on conscript agricultural workers here. Residual case files were never purged.
sites.dismantling_hook: Recover residual marker data. Publish, trade to a genship resistance cell, or destroy to control the narrative.

sites.name: Adebayo Memorial Reservoir
sites.location: Buried under a dust-covered outflow channel, Arabia Terra, Mars
sites.surface_expression: A damp outflow fan visible from orbit. Public surveys list the channel as dry with no significant subsurface ice.
sites.secret: The Adebayo engineering team ran a ground-penetrating radar survey showing a connected reservoir system. Lindqvist issued a drill-permit denial and suppressed the results.
access_requirements: Adebayo engineer contact + radar data from a derelict survey probe
sites.dismantling_hook: Expose the suppressed scale data. Reserves are large enough to fully liberate every genship from water dependence contracts, breaking Kepler Settlements' habitat monopoly.

sites.name: Orison Scrapyard
sites.location: Surface-grade alloy testing range, Elysium Planitia, Mars
sites.surface_expression: A flat graded basin littered with hull plate fragments and test pylon markers. Forge and Frame lists it as a materials recycling depot.
sites.secret: Orison dumped fatigue-cracked hull plates here after the 18-year alloy failure tests. Kowalski documented the failure mode but concealed it to build the mandatory refit billing chain.
access_requirements: Kowalski maintenance codes (from Anza at Moscow Prospekt or B3 Holdfast)
Radiation hazard bypass through a sealed shelter corridor
sites.dismantling_hook: Recover the cracked hull plates and fatigue test record. Publish to trigger a fleet-wide inspection and collapse the mandatory refit billing cycle.
